title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: FAA requires mishap investigation into latest Starship launch
summary:
The Federal Aviation Administration will require SpaceX to complete an investigation into its latest Starship test flight before allowing the vehicle to fly again.
The post FAA requires mishap investigation into latest Starship launch appeared first on SpaceNews.

title: Here's How Much Bitcoin Elon Musk Would Control If SpaceX and Tesla Merge
summary: If Tesla and SpaceX merged—as is a reported possibility—then Elon Musk's combined entity would hold billions of dollars' worth of Bitcoin.

title: Orca, Streamex roll out secondary trading infrastructure for tokenized securities
summary: Accredited investors can buy and sell the gold-backed GLDY token through permissioned liquidity pools operating on the Solana blockchain.

title: OpenAI Foundation Pledges $250 Million to Help Cushion AI's Economic Disruption
summary: The philanthropic arm of ChatGPT maker OpenAI will fund research, worker support, and new models for sharing the gains from automation.

title: SoFi Launches SoFiUSD Stablecoin Across Ethereum and Solana
summary: SoFi is making its SoFiUSD token available to members, marking a milestone in the convergence of regulated banking and blockchain.

title: AI coding startup Cognition raises $1B at $25B pre-money valuation
summary: As Cognition reaches $492 million in annualized revenue run rate, it more than doubled its valuation in eight months, it says.

title: FAA orders SpaceX to investigate Starship V3 booster failure
summary: Starship is grounded until SpaceX finds out why the first V3 booster failed during its first test flight.

title: StakeDAO exploit creates 5.4 trillion vsdCRV but nets only $91K
summary: PeckShield said the attacker bridged 43.7 ETH to Ethereum after minting trillions of vsdCRV, while EmberCN said most of the remaining tokens had insufficient liquidity to sell.

title: Mastercard Secures New York BitLicense in Push for Stablecoins, Tokenized Deposits
summary: Mastercard has secured a highly coveted BitLicense in New York, anchoring its compliance-first strategy for stablecoins on Wall Street.

title: Europe’s satellite spectrum proposal clouds SpaceX and Viasat plans
summary:
